title: Captain Lechi
actors: Aleksandar Gavric, Petar Prlicko, Dimitar Kostarov
plot: Kosmet in the fall of 1944. The Partisans have successfully liberated the town of Prizren from occupying Germans,and Ramiz Lesi, a brave and cunning KNOJ captain, has to liquidate the remainder of the local Quislings, called Balis...
